verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come and see the beauty of the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come and know the wonder of His grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come and see how much He cares for you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Gaze at the compassion in His face

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come and touch the nail prints in His hands

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Find the friend who truly understands

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come and stand beneath the blood-stained cross

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Proof of His unchanging love for us

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: He is worthy, worthy of our praise

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: He is worthy, worthy of our praise

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: He is glorious, He is wonderful

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Come and see the stone’s been rolled away

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: The tomb is empty where His body lay

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Why seek the Living One among the dead

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: You won’t find Jesus there because He lives
